name: 11ai-agent-automation
description: Build autonomous, scheduled agent automations with the Ledger + Conductor + Routine pattern: one milestone per tick (a full vertical slice per run), a depth bar that blocks brochure-ware output, evidence-backed reviews, and a provider-agnostic runner for any headless agent CLI. Eight skills: the core method, a worked example, an any-goal automation creator, a ledger idea-seeder for humans to queue work, a SaaS product-fleet lifecycle and its creator, and a single-SaaS production-depth lifecycle and its creator.
